hero.badge: Bayanan da aka duba • Fasahar hango abubuwa • An tantance rajista
hero.subtitle: Daga cikin bayanan masu bayarwa na duniya {{suppliers}}—{{leads}} ingantattun shawarwarin kasuwanci, nazarin AI, da bayanai masu dacewa. Inganci fiye da yawa. Ku shiga tare da sama da 50,000 masu sayayya.

trust.byDecisionMakers: An amince da shi daga masu yanke hukunci a duniya
trust.worldwide: An amince da shi daga ƙungiyoyin neman kaya a duniya

home.supplierNetwork.titleSuffix: Masu bayarwa da aka tantance & ƙara
home.supplierNetwork.subtitleSuffix: ƙasashe—rajista mai goyon baya, ingancin bin doka, shirye don nazarin zurfi.
home.supplierRegions.title: Masu bayarwa ta Yanki
home.industries.title: Masana'antu sama da 20. Masu Kyau don Tattalin Arziki na Gaskiya.
home.industries.subtitle: Daga hakar ma'adanai da ƙera kayayyaki zuwa kiwon lafiya da lantarki—masu bayarwa da aka tantance rajista wanda aka tsara don neman kaya na masana'antu da B2B.
home.features.title: An gina don lokutan da suka fi muhimmanci a cikin sayayya
home.features.subtitle: Ba ainihin bayanan tuntuba ba. Kyakkyawar hangen nesa game da masu bayarwa, farashi, da hadari—an tsara su don sayayya, ayyuka, da ƙungiyoyin neman kaya.
home.showcase.title: Hangen Nesa da ke Tafiyar da Sakamako
home.showcase.subtitle: Cikakken hangen nesa kan masu bayarwa, farashi, da hadari. Bayanai {{suppliers}}—sai a sabunta su akai-akai, masu tsawo sauti, ba tare da karfi ba.
home.howItWorks.title: Daga Bincike zuwa Hukunci cikin Minti
home.howItWorks.subtitle: Matakai guda uku masu sauƙi don neman kaya mai wayo. Babu rikitarwa. Sakamako kawai.
home.step1.title: Fada Mana Abinda Kake Bukata
home.step1.desc: Shigar da kayanka, bayananka, yawan, da yankunan da kake so. AI ɗinmu na fahimtar ainihin abin da kake nema.
home.step2.title: AI na gudanar da babban aiki
home.step2.desc: Muna nazarin zane mai bayarwa na duniya {{suppliers}}, lissafa ainihin farashin kaya, da kimanta hadari—rajista mai goyon baya, ingancin bin doka.
home.step3.title: Yanke Hukunci da Tabbas
home.step3.desc: Samun cikakken rahoto tare da masu bayarwa da aka dace, fassarar farashi, da shawarwari masu yiwuwa.
home.cta.title: Hukunci Masu Kyau Sun Fara Anan
home.cta.subtitle: Shiga cikin ƙwararru 50,000+ na sayayya waɗanda suka daina tsammani kuma suka fara samo kayan tare da tabbatacce.
home.cta.button: Fara tare da Kyautar Kudi 2 kyauta
home.cta.footer: Babu kati · Shirin kyauta · Zai iya soke kowane lokaci
footer.tagline: Sourcing da hankali na kasuwanci tare da AI don masu saye na ƙwararren.
footer.designedFor: Masu bayarwa na farko. Hankalin kasuwanci na farko. An gina don ƙungiyoyin kasuwanci.
trust.strip1: Ana amincewa da ƙungiyoyin sourcing a duniya
home.feature1.title: Hankalin Hadari
home.feature1.desc: Yi amfani da bayanan masu bayarwa {{suppliers}} a cikin yankuna sama da {{countries}}. Gano haɗarin siyasa, kuɗi, da aiki kafin su shafi kasuwancinka—kula da ai da gargaɗin da ya dace.
home.feature2.title: Mai Lissafin Farashi Mai Sauka
home.feature2.desc: Sami farashin gaskiya ciki har da haraji, jigilar kaya, inshora, da canje-canje na kuɗi. Zurfin bayanan kasuwanci, ba tsammani ba. Babu kudaden mamaki.
home.feature3.title: Samo Jagororin Masu saye & Kasuwanci
home.feature3.desc: {{leads}} jagororin masu saye & kasuwanci—an tsara su da AI bisa niyyar, firmerographics, da siginar kasuwanci. Ba a sami yanayi mara kyau ba. Ingantaccen, bayanan da za a iya nazari don ƙungiyoyin kasuwanci.
home.feature4.title: Bin Ka'idoji ya zama Mai Sauƙi
home.feature4.desc: Tabbacin da aka goyi bayan rajistar, dubawa na shaidar, da hanyoyin tabbatarwa. Bayanan da suka dace da ka'idoji don ka mai da hankali kan abinda ya ke da mahimmanci.
home.feature5.title: Bayanai na Masu Bayarwa na Duniya
home.feature5.desc: Samun masu bayarwa {{suppliers}} waɗanda suka inganta kuma aka amince dasu a cikin kasashe {{countries}}. A tace bisa masana'antu, yanki, shaidar. Samu haɗinka cikin ɗan gajeren lokaci.
home.feature6.title: Rahotanni Masu Gudanar da AI
home.feature6.desc: Rahotannin sourcing masu fa'ida tare da nazarin kasuwa, kwatancen masu bayarwa, da shawarwari masu amfani. Zurfin ƙwararru ga ƙungiyoyin kasuwanci.
home.industry1.title: Hakaru & Ma'adinai
home.industry1.desc: Antimony, tin, lithium, cobalt, copper, da ma'adinai masu rarar. Masu bayar da ma'adinai masu inganci don mahimman hanyoyin samarwa.
home.industry2.title: Kera & Masana'antu
home.industry2.desc: Samu kayan haɗi, sassa, da na'ura daga masana'antun da aka tabbatar da a duniya.
home.industry3.title: Lantarki & Fasaha
home.industry3.desc: Samo masu bayarwa na semiconductors, masu kera PCB, da masu rarraba kayan fasaha.
home.industry4.title: Kayayyakin Masu Amfani & Kasuwanci
home.industry4.desc: Haɗa tare da masu bayarwa don marufi, kayan da aka gama, da kayayyakin alamar kansu.
home.industry5.title: Motoci & Jiragen Ƙasa
home.industry5.desc: Samu sassan motoci, sassan OEM, da kayan jigilar kaya a duniya.
home.industry6.title: Kiwan Lafiya & Kayan Kiwon Lafiya
home.industry6.desc: Samo masu bayarwa masu bin ka'idojin FDA don kayan aikin lafiya da kayayyakin kiwon lafiya.
home.industry7.title: Gine-gine & Kayan Gini
home.industry7.desc: Samu kayan gini, kayan nauyi, da kayan gini.
persona.procurers.headline: Rage haɗari. Inganta ribar. Kasance daidai.
persona.procurers.subline: Tantance masu kaya da AI, daidai farashin kayayyaki, da lura da bin doka ga ƙungiyoyin sayayya.
persona.entrepreneurs.headline: Taimaka da sauri. Faɗaɗa hikima. Fara da wuri.
persona.entrepreneurs.subline: Samun masu kaya da aka tabbatar cikin mintuna, ba makonni ba. Farashi mai kyau ga masu farawa tare da kayan aikin ingancin kamfani.
persona.suppliers.headline: Samun ganewa. Samu karin RFQs.
persona.suppliers.subline: Shiga cikin masu kaya {{suppliers}} da aka tabbatar. Karɓi binciken masu saye da suka cancanta kuma haɓaka kasuwancin kauyanka.
persona.producers.headline: Kula da farashi. Tabbatar da inganci. Faɗaɗa hanyoyin.
persona.producers.subline: Samar da kayan ƙera, ƙididdigar farashi, da kuma faɗaɗa masu kaya don shugabannin masana'antu.
methodology.title: Yadda muke tantance masu kaya
methodology.subtitle: Fahimtar manufofinmu yana gina amana. Ga yadda muke tabbatar da ingancin bayanai.
methodology.step1.title: Tattara bayanai
methodology.step1.desc: Muna haɗa bayanan masu kaya daga rajistar kasuwanci, takardun shaidar, da hanyoyin kasuwanci da aka tabbatar. Ana sabunta zane mai zaman kansa na masu kaya daga ko'ina cikin duniya.
methodology.step2.title: Tantancewa
methodology.step2.desc: Kowane mai kaya yana ƙarƙashin tantance rajistar kasuwanci, tabbatar da tarihin kasuwanci, da duban bin doka. Tabbatar da rajista, ingancin doka.
methodology.step3.title: Kimantawa inganci
methodology.step3.desc: Algoritms ɗinmu suna kimanta masu kaya bisa ga lokacin amsa, matsayi na shaidar, da ra'ayoyin masu saye. AI-rank, babban alama.
methodology.step4.title: Kulawa a kai a kai
methodology.step4.desc: Muna ci gaba da lura da alamar haɗari da sabunta matsayin masu kaya bisa ga bayanan lokacin ainihi. Tabbatar da basira, tushen rajista.
integrationsPage.title: Hada SmartSeek da Tsarinku
integrationsPage.subtitle: Haɗa masu kaya, RFQs, da farashin da aka kai tare da tsarin sayayya da ERP ɗinku. OAuth mai danna guda, API mai tsaro, da haɗaɗɗun masu haɗawa.
integrationsPage.supportedDesc: Hada da kayan aikin sayayya na yanzu. Bayanai suna ci gaba da kasancewa tare da juna a kai a kai.
integrationsPage.step1Desc: Zaɓi SAP Ariba, Oracle, Salesforce, ko wasu daga cikin jerin.
integrationsPage.step2Desc: Tsarin OAuth 2.0—ba a raba kalmar sirri. Ana goyon bayan SSO na kamfani.
integrationsPage.step3Desc: Masu kaya, RFQs, da bayanan farashi suna gudana tsakanin tsarin a cikin lokacin ainihi.
integrationsPage.securityDesc: An tabbatar da SOC 2. An leƙe bayanan a cikin hanya da a lokacin ajiye. Babu shaidar da aka ajiye.
integrationsPage.allPlatforms: Duk dandamalin da ake goyon baya
home.trial.title: Fara Gwajin Ku na Kyauta
home.trial.footer: Babu katin kiredit • Rahotanni 2 kyauta • Cikakken shiga dandamali

home.testimonials.title: Amintacce daga Masu Sayi, 'Yan Kasuwa & Masu Kaya
home.testimonials.subtitle: Ayyukan gaskiya daga ƙungiyoyin da suka canza zuwa yin siyayya mai hankali.
home.benefits.saveTitle: Ajiye Lokaci & Kuɗi a kan Kowane Shawara
home.benefits.saveDesc: Masu amfani da SmartSeek suna bayar da rahoton manyan canje-canje a cikin ajiye kuɗi, rage haɗari, da saurin siye. Duba bambanci a cikin rahoton ku na farko.
home.benefits.resilience: 40% mafi kyau wajen juriya a cikin hanyar sadarwa
home.benefits.compliance: Monitoring na dacewa a hakikanin lokaci
home.benefits.securityDesc: SmartSeek na tabbatar da mafi girman ka'idojin tsaro da dacewa, tare da dacewar SOC 2, ɓoyayyen bayanai, da ikon samun shiga bisa ga rawar da aka ba.
home.benefits.encryption: Ɓoyayyen bayanai daga ƙarshe zuwa ƙarshe
home.ready.title: Shirye don Sourcing Mai Kaifin Hankali?
home.ready.subtitle: Fara yanke shawara mai kyau a yau. Babu katin kiredit da ake buƙata.

auth.tryAgainOrEmail: Da fatan za a sake gwadawa ko amfani da imel/sirri.
auth.resetLinkSent: Idan asusun yana akwai, mun aika muku da haɗi don sake saita.
auth.accountCreatedDesc: Maraba da SmartSeek. Kun karɓi ƙarin kiredit 2 kyauta.
auth.loginSuccessDesc: An shiga ku yadda ya kamata.

home.testimonial1.quote: SmartSeek ta rage lokacin tantance masu sayarwa da kashi 60%. Kimantawa ta hanyar AI tana ba mu kwarin gwiwa a kowanne yanke shawarar samun kaya da muke yi.
home.testimonial1.name: Sarah Chen
home.testimonial1.role: Mataimakin Shugaban Sayi, Global Manufacturing Corp
home.testimonial2.quote: Calculator na farashin da aka sanya kawai ya ceci mu daga abubuwa uku masu tsada a karshe. Ya zama muhimmin kayan aiki ga tawagar mu ta samun kaya ta duniya.
home.testimonial2.name: Marcus Weber
home.testimonial3.quote: Mun gano masu sayarwa da aka tabbatar a yankuna da ba mu taɓa la'akari da su ba. Rahotannin AI na SmartSeek sun bayar da bayanan da muke buƙata don bambanta hanyar samar da mu.
home.testimonial3.name: Priya Sharma
home.testimonial3.role: Shugaban Samun Dabara, Atlas Retail Group
home.hero.badge: Ana amincewa da masu saye 50,000+ a duniya
home.hero.title1: Samu mai sayarwa da ya dace.
home.hero.subtitleBase: {{suppliers}} masu sayarwa na duniya da aka tabbatar, ingantaccen farashi da hankali na haɗari na AI - don haka tawagarku na yanke shawara cikin
home.hero.painLine: Daina aika imel na sanyi. Daina hasashen farashi. Daina mamaki a kan haddin shigo.
home.hero.searchPlaceholder: Gwada: "masana'antar kainan auduga, Turkiyya" ko "littattafan lantarki, Vietnam"
home.hero.proofLine: Matsakaicin bincike yana dawo da {{matches}} ingantattun haɗuwa a ƙasa da dakika ɗaya
home.hero.chip1: Babu katin kiredit da ake buƙata
home.integrations.label: Yana haɗawa da kayan aikin da ƙungiyar sayan ku ke amfani da su
home.feat1.quote: "Muna kashe makonni 3 muna aiko wa masu sayarwa imel ba tare da sun amsa ba - kuma har yanzu muna samun wadanda ba su dace ba."
home.feat1.title: Gano masu sayar da aka tabbatar cikin seconds
home.feat1.desc: Tuntuɓar da hukumomi suka tabbatar daga cikin masu sayarwa {{suppliers}}. Babu imel da aka janye. Babu hanyoyin da ba su yi aiki ba.
home.feat1.b1: Imel & waya an haɗa - babu neman
home.feat1.b2: Fitar da bisa takarda, ƙasa, MOQ, ma'aikata
home.feat2.quote: "Mun tsara kasafin kudi na $42k. Invoices sun ce $61k. Bambancin shi ne haraji da ba mu san suna nan ba."
home.feat2.title: San farashin ku na gaske kafin ku yarda
home.feat2.desc: Haraji, jigilar kaya, inshora, kudin tashar, VAT - an ƙididdige su a gaba. Babu mamaki idan kwandon ya iso.
home.feat2.b1: HS code dubawa & rates na haraji da ke kan layi
home.feat2.b2: Teɓur FCL/LCL, iska, kwalliya an kwatanta
home.feat2.cta: Ƙididdige farashin da za a sauke
home.feat3.quote: "Mafi kyawun mai sayarwa yana cikin yanki da ya ragu. Bamu da shirin madadin kuma mun rasa makonni 6 na samarwa."
home.feat3.title: Gano haɗarin mai sayarwa kafin ya yi muku asara
home.feat3.desc: AI na ƙididdige haɗari don kowanne mai sayar da kowane yanki. Alamomin siyasa na duniya. Hanyoyin samun madadin sun samo su kai tsaye.
home.feat3.b1: Ninkin haɗari 0–100 don kowanne mai sayarwa
home.feat3.b2: Alamomin siyasa na duniya da bin doka a lokacin gaske
home.feat3.b3: Madadin da aka ba da shawara kai tsaye
home.pain.stat1desc: Tsakanin lokacin da ƙungiyoyin sayan ke ɓata akan binciken masu sayarwa na hannu
home.pain.stat2desc: Kimanin asarar shekara-shekara daga kowace kamfani daga kuɗaɗen shigo da da ba a gane ba da zaɓin masu sayar wa mara kyau
home.pain.stat3desc: Tsakanin rage farashi da masu amfani da SmartSeek suka bayar a cikin kwanaki 90 na farko
home.pain.footnote: Masu amfani da SmartSeek suna daga ƙarin awoyi 14 na bincike na mako zuwa ƙasa da 2. Wannan yana nufin awoyi 12 a baya - kowane mako.
home.hiw.title: Daga bincike zuwa kwangila cikin kwanaki - ba watanni ba
home.hiw.step1.title: Bincika
home.hiw.step1.desc: Rubuta samfur, kayan, ko masana'antu. Samu 200+ ingantattun haɗuwa cikin sauri - tare da bayanan tuntuɓa.
home.hiw.step2.title: Nazari
home.hiw.step2.desc: AI yana ƙididdige kowanne mai sayarwa akan haɗari, inganci, da farashin da za a sauke. Kwatanta ƙasashe da hanyoyi guda biyu a gefe.
home.hiw.step3.title: Tattara
home.hiw.step3.desc: Tuntuɓi masu sayarwa kai tsaye, aiko da RFQ, kuma ci gaba - duk ba tare da barin dandalin ba.
